findings.title: Build User Behavior Tracking Pipeline
findings.description: Implement a data ingestion pipeline that captures browsing history, click patterns, scroll depth, and time-on-page metrics for each authenticated user. The pipeline must handle at minimum 50k events/second at peak.
assumptions: The infrastructure can support the required event throughput.
recommendations: Ensure compliance with GDPR during data collection.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the user is authenticated, WHEN they browse content, THEN their browsing history and click patterns are captured and streamed to the data lake in real-time.

findings.title: Implement ML Recommendation Engine
findings.description: Build a recommendation engine that uses accumulated user profile data to serve personalized content suggestions, targeting a 20% improvement in content CTR within 60 days.
assumptions: The recommendation algorithms will effectively utilize user data.
recommendations: Conduct A/B testing to optimize the recommendation engine.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN user profiles are available, WHEN the recommendation engine processes the data, THEN it generates personalized content suggestions with a target CTR improvement of 20%.

findings.title: Create User Preference Dashboard
findings.description: Build a user-facing dashboard that displays collected behavioral data, allowing users to see their inferred interests and opt out of specific tracking categories.
assumptions: Users will engage with the dashboard to manage their preferences.
recommendations: Ensure the dashboard is user-friendly and accessible.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the user accesses the dashboard, WHEN they view their data, THEN they can see their inferred interests and have options to opt out of specific tracking categories.

findings.title: Add Cross-Device Tracking
findings.description: Implement cross-device tracking to link user activity across mobile and web sessions, ensuring a unified user profile.
assumptions: Users will be logged in across devices.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user is logged in on multiple devices, WHEN they interact with content, THEN their activity is linked to their unified profile.

findings.title: Implement Data Export for Advertisers
findings.description: Create an API and batch export system for sharing anonymized user profile segments with advertising partners, ensuring anonymization to prevent re-identification.
recommendations: Validate the anonymization pipeline to prevent re-identification.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the data export system is implemented, WHEN advertisers request user segments, THEN they receive anonymized cohort-level data without individual identifiers.

findings.title: Conduct GDPR Compliance Audit
findings.description: Perform a full GDPR compliance audit to address concerns regarding lawful basis for processing, consent mechanisms, and data retention policies.
assumptions: Legal requirements will be met to launch in the EU market.
recommendations: Complete the audit before product launch.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the audit team is assembled, WHEN the audit is conducted, THEN all GDPR compliance concerns are addressed and documented.

findings.title: User Feedback Collection Mechanism
findings.description: Implement a mechanism for collecting user feedback on content recommendations and transparency features to continuously improve user experience.
assumptions: Users will provide feedback on their experience.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the feedback mechanism is in place, WHEN users provide feedback, THEN it is collected and analyzed for future improvements.

findings.title: Monitor Privacy Opt-Out Rate
findings.description: Implement monitoring for the Privacy Opt-Out Rate to ensure compliance with user preferences and privacy regulations.
assumptions: Monitoring tools will be effective in tracking opt-out rates.
recommendations: Adjust data collection practices based on opt-out trends.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the monitoring system is in place, WHEN users opt out, THEN the opt-out rate is tracked and reported regularly.

findings.title: A/B Testing for Recommendation Engine
findings.description: Conduct A/B testing to evaluate the effectiveness of different recommendation algorithms on CTR.
assumptions: Different algorithms will yield varying results.

evidence.excerpt: Conduct A/B testing to evaluate the effectiveness of different recommendation algorithms

recommendations: Analyze results to identify the best-performing model.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the A/B testing framework is set up, WHEN tests are conducted, THEN the results are analyzed to determine the best-performing recommendation algorithm.

findings.title: Implement User Data Export Feature
findings.description: Allow users to export their data in compliance with GDPR, enabling them to access their personal information.
assumptions: Users will want to access their data.
recommendations: Ensure the export feature is user-friendly.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the user requests their data export, WHEN the request is processed, THEN the user receives their personal data in a structured format.

findings.title: Implement User Consent Management
findings.description: Create a system for managing user consent for data collection and processing, ensuring compliance with GDPR requirements.
assumptions: Users will need to provide consent for data processing.
recommendations: Ensure the consent management system is transparent and user-friendly.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the consent management system is implemented, WHEN users interact with the platform, THEN they are prompted to provide consent for data collection and processing.

findings.title: Implement Data Retention Policies
findings.description: Establish data retention policies that comply with GDPR, ensuring that user data is retained only as long as necessary.
assumptions: Data retention policies will be enforced.
recommendations: Regularly review and update data retention policies.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the data retention policies are established, WHEN user data is processed, THEN it is retained only for the duration necessary for its purpose.

summary: The analysis resulted in a comprehensive set of requirements focused on user behavior tracking, GDPR compliance, and user transparency. Each requirement is structured with clear acceptance criteria, priorities, and dependencies, ensuring a well-defined product backlog for the PersonaLens User Profiling project.
